displayTitle: Han Solo: Imperial Cadet Part I
synopsis: YOUNG SOLO'S ADVENTURES CONTINUE! HAN SOLO escapes Corellia by joining the IMPERIAL NAVY, vowing to return for QI'RA. But how does a thief used to the chaos of the streets adjust to the order and discipline of the military? Not well! Han's dream of becoming a pilot is quickly grounded as he realizes he may not even survive basic training!
title: Han Solo: Imperial Cadet Part I
